---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Device (please complete the following information):**

 - Android Version [e.g. Android 16]
 - ROM [e.g. HyperOS 3.0, ColorOS 13.0.8]
 - Build Version [e.g. 1.8.0]

**Crash log**
Copy the crash log dialog and paste here. Ignore this if crashed and did not show any dialog.

**App log**
Go to Settings > Scroll down to Developer > Logs > Export logs. And paste here as file or raw text. Ignore this if you cannot open the app at all.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
